name: Tomato Bisque
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Fresh basil, finely chopped (or 1 tsp dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the tomatoes.
2. Saute onion in butter until translucent.
3. Add chopped tomatoes to the sauteed onion.
4. Stir in bay leaf, brown sugar, cloves, salt, pepper, and basil.
5. Simmer the mixture for about 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove bay leaf and cloves from the pot.
7. Transfer the mixture to a blender or food processor and puree.
8. Strain the purée through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl.
9. Stir in cream and milk until well combined.
10. Heat the mixture over medium-low heat until it is heated through.
11. Serve topped with toasted, buttered croutons.
12. Sprinkle chopped chives on top before serving.
